info.name: Cloudflare D1 API
info.description:
The Cloudflare D1 API provides endpoints for managing serverless SQL databases on Cloudflare's network. Developers can create, list, and delete databases, execute raw queries, import and export database contents, and use time travel to restore databases to previous states.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Cloudflare account.
(Required) The unique identifier of the D1 database.

request.description: Execute a SQL query against the D1 database. Returns results with metadata about the execution.
